title: [regression in 4.210] error: no matching constructor for initialization of 'const VlUnpacked<CData, 64>' (aka 'const VlUnpacked<unsigned char, 64>')
body:
In my project I am getting this error with 4.210 that didn't exist with 4.204:
```
/usr/home/yuri/xx/CMakeFiles/verilog-emulator-library.dir/Vtest_bench.dir/Vtest_bench__ConstPool_0.cpp:7:43: error: no matching constructor for initialization of 'const VlUnpacked<CData, 64>' (aka 'const VlUnpacked<unsigned char, 64>')
extern const VlUnpacked<CData/*0:0*/, 64> Vtest_bench__ConstPool__TABLE_0af57490_0 = {{
                                          ^                                          ~~
/usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_heavy.h:823:5: note: candidate constructor not viable: cannot convert initializer list argument to 'const VlUnpacked<unsigned char, 64>'
    VlUnpacked(const VlUnpacked&) = default;
    ^
/usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_heavy.h:824:5: note: candidate constructor not viable: cannot convert initializer list argument to 'VlUnpacked<unsigned char, 64>'
    VlUnpacked(VlUnpacked&&) = default;
    ^
/usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_heavy.h:821:5: note: candidate constructor not viable: requires 0 arguments, but 1 was provided
    VlUnpacked() = default;
    ^
/usr/home/yuri/xx/CMakeFiles/verilog-emulator-library.dir/Vtest_bench.dir/Vtest_bench__ConstPool_0.cpp:18:43: error: no matching constructor for initialization of 'const VlUnpacked<CData, 64>' (aka 'const VlUnpacked<unsigned char, 64>')
extern const VlUnpacked<CData/*0:0*/, 64> Vtest_bench__ConstPool__TABLE_1bbcd680_0 = {{
                                          ^                                          ~~
/usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_heavy.h:823:5: note: candidate constructor not viable: cannot convert initializer list argument to 'const VlUnpacked<unsigned char, 64>'
    VlUnpacked(const VlUnpacked&) = default;
    ^
/usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_heavy.h:824:5: note: candidate constructor not viable: cannot convert initializer list argument to 'VlUnpacked<unsigned char, 64>'
    VlUnpacked(VlUnpacked&&) = default;
    ^
/usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_heavy.h:821:5: note: candidate constructor not viable: requires 0 arguments, but 1 was provided
    VlUnpacked() = default;
    ^
/usr/home/yuri/xx/CMakeFiles/verilog-emulator-library.dir/Vtest_bench.dir/Vtest_bench__ConstPool_0.cpp:29:43: error: no matching constructor for initialization of 'const VlUnpacked<CData, 64>' (aka 'const VlUnpacked<unsigned char, 64>')
```
